notes: Pickleheads lists exactly 5 Redwood City venues totaling 14 courts (4+3+2+2+3), which matches the sum of the 5 venue detail pages found — no discrepancy like Berkeley's. All 3 existing baseline entries matched a Pickleheads venue (so notOnPickleheads is empty). Two matches came back with unresolved price conflicts (Red Morton Community Center and Sequoia YMCA) and one with an hours conflict (Red Morton Park) — all left confirmed:false for human review. Note that Red Morton Park (outdoor courts) and Red Morton Community Center (indoor gym) are two separate Pickleheads detail pages that are both part of the same physical Red Morton Park/Center complex at Roosevelt Ave; the existing baseline's 'Red Morton Senior Center' name differs from Pickleheads' 'Red Morton Community Center' for what appears to be the identical indoor gym (same address, same court count) — flagged rather than assumed. No numeric Google Maps cid could be confirmed for any of the 5 venues via WebSearch, so googleMapsUrl is null throughout.

venues.name: Red Morton Park
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court — permanent lines, portable nets
venues.price: Free walk-up; also reservable for a fee (fee amount not stated by sources checked)
venues.hours: Mon–Sat 12–4pm (Courts A&B), 4–8pm (Courts C&D); Sun 1–4pm — per ThePickleballDinks/PicklePlay court-listing pages (pickleheads.com's own page states no specific hours)

conflicts.pickleheads: Not stated on pickleheads.com itself; a related pickleball-court-listing source states Mon–Sat 12–4pm (Courts A&B) / 4–8pm (Courts C&D), Sun 1–4pm — a much more specific schedule that may describe reservation windows rather than general park access, but conflicts on its face with the existing dawn-dusk value

venues.notes: Matched to existing 'red-morton-park-outdoor-courts' by identical address and court count (4). Pickleheads' own page states the free courts 'can be reserved for a fee' in addition to free drop-in, filling the existing 'reservable' gap ('Not specified' → 'Mixed'). bookingUrl is Redwood City's general ActiveCommunities reservation portal (category-filtered), not a venue-specific deep link — could not confirm a more precise URL.

venues.name: Red Morton Community Center
venues.surface: Indoor hard court (gym) — permanent lines, portable nets
venues.notes: Matched to existing 'Red Morton Senior Center — indoor courts' by identical address (1120 Roosevelt Ave) and court count (3); Pickleheads calls it 'Red Morton Community Center' rather than 'Senior Center' — likely the same gym referred to by two names, flagged rather than assumed. Pickleheads itself says reservation availability is uncertain, so 'reservable' and existing baseline's 'Wed 11:30am–2:30pm' hours are left as-is (Not specified here, not contradicted).

venues.name: Sequoia YMCA
venues.price: Membership required to play (no specific fee amount stated by pickleheads.com)

conflicts.existing: $10 monthly pass + $45 one-time program fee, or $15 drop-in
conflicts.pickleheads: Membership required to play (blanket statement, no drop-in-without-membership option mentioned)

venues.notes: Court count (2) matches baseline exactly, corroborating the venue. General YMCA facility hours found via Yelp (Mon–Thu 6am–9pm, Fri 6am–8pm, Sat–Sun 8am–2pm) describe overall gym hours, not confirmed as pickleball-specific open-play windows, so left out of the 'hours' field rather than conflated with existing baseline's 'Tue/Thu 12:30–2:30pm' pickleball session time. Price conflict: Pickleheads' blanket 'membership required' framing is in tension with baseline's stated $15 drop-in option — a human should confirm current YMCA pickleball access policy.

venues.name: Andrew Spinas Park
venues.surface: Outdoor hard court — permanent lines, portable nets
amenities: Tennis court (shared-use agreement allows portable pickleball nets)
venues.notes: Not present in courts-data.json/venues.json baseline — new venue. 'Walk-up' and hours sourced from the City of Redwood City's own pickleball/facility pages ('first come, first served basis 7 days a week from dawn to dusk, with lighted courts open until 10:00pm'), which also matches the phrasing style already used for Red Morton Park's outdoor courts in courts-data.json. Coordinates came from a third-party aggregator (bippermedia), not an official geocode, so approxLocation is set true; a human should verify precise lat/lon before merging. No numeric Google Maps cid found via WebSearch.

venues.name: Stanford Redwood City Recreation & Wellness Center
venues.price: Membership required (open play included); paid 10-week recreational pickleball classes also separately available — e.g. Students $104, Staff/Faculty $123, Community $204 (rates vary by affiliation)
venues.hours: Open pickleball: Tue 4–5:30pm, Wed 12–1:30pm, Fri 9:30–11am — first come, first served unless a scheduled Open Rec activity or special event is running; no registration required for open play
venues.notes: Not present in courts-data.json/venues.json baseline — new venue. Access requires an SRWC membership and is 18+ only per facility policy. No precise lat/lon confirmed via search (address only, so approxLocation set true) and no numeric Google Maps cid found.
